items.title: Why did Moe remove mid-year exams?

expanded_element.title: Effect of removing mid-year examinations | MOE
expanded_element.description: 2. The removal of Mid-Year Examinations should be understood in the right spirit. It is not aimed at reducing stress per se, but at reducing the overemphasis on examinations and grades, and to free up time and space for teachers to provide more engaging learning experiences and pace learning.

items.title: What is the phone number for Jeremy exam papers?

expanded_element.title: Where to buy test papers like before? : r/SGExams - Reddit
expanded_element.description: Just call Jeremy Exam Papers at 98518226. They will deliver the papers to your door step. Very worth it, great in helping you prepare for WA and exams.

expanded_element.title: Are fewer exams a worry? 'Students actually learn more this way'
expanded_element.description: Since 2023, mid-year examinations have been removed for all primary and secondary school students. The same change kicked in for junior colleges this year.

items.title: What is the primary school leaving exam in Singapore?

expanded_element.title: All About Primary School Leaving Examinations (PSLE) - SmileTutor
expanded_element.description: What is PSLE and Why is it Important? The Primary School Leaving Examination (PSLE) is the first national examination that all Primary 6 students must sit for at the end of their long six years in primary school in Singapore.
